Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John N. Dahlberg, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party Friedkin Realty Managment
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Friedkin Realty Management Group, Inc.'s Application For Writ of Attachment is granted in the amount of $3,614,533.12. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.00.
Defendant's claims of exemption are denied. The writ does not apply to the Washington Mutual bank acount no. 488-302532-6, and no writ shall issue as to that account and any levy upon the account is vacated. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Plaintiff'S Ex-Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment Or Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Feb-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John Dahlberg, appeared for Plaintiff/moving party
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application For Writ of Attachment or Temporary Protective Order is granted as it seeks a temporary protective order. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. The court will not make any orders regarding discovery without a noticed motion. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
